title: Ubiquiti Rocket R2AC-Prism, 2GHz
description: Rocket® Prism access points incorporate high-performance airMAX ac and airPrism technologies for maximum performance of wireless networks in high-density areas, in 2.4 GHz. Maximal modulation speed is 433Mbps with 40MHz channel width Ubiquitiâs patented airPrism technology provides breakthrough radio selectivity in unlicensed wireless band performance. airPrism technology isolates signals within the operating channel to increase capacity and throughput in co-location deployments The Rocket® Prism AC features EMI-shielded metal housing, GPS (since 8.3.1 fw), airPrism circuitry, and the airView® real-time spectrum analyzer to deliver maximum spectral efficiency/throughput airOS®8 provides powerful features, including airMAX® ac protocol support, real-time RF analytics, and an all-new design for enhanced usability Device PoE power adapter 24V / 0.5A, gigabit Power cord GPS antenna
